content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be redefined as nested, agent-like entities themselves, where each memory chunk acts as an independent curious active learner that selects which new experiences to integrate and when to surface itself for the parent agent’s episodic planning. This creates a multi-agent hierarchy of curiosity-driven memory that outperforms monolithic memory architectures at long-horizon task adaptation.
